---
title: "Stokesley Secret, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Stokesley Secret, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1861
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London. Masters and Co., 78, New Bond Street, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
